name: Vickie Lynn
text: This place is huge ! 2 levels of shopping.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Nicholas Hamilton
text: Great study space and the bojangles is great
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Tarick Hackney
text: Nice
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Tim G
text: I miss the old school student union. No more bowling alleys. Where is APO's lost and found? Barely recognize the inside. Felt sad about this :(
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Angie LaRue
text: Bright and clean facility for graduation
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Rachel Saunders
text: The SU is a great place to hang, do work, and grab a bite to eat. It has power points throughout, and the WiFi is good. If you are in a group it has plenty of space to do work and talk about class.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: General Consumer
text: Very nice. Clothing a little on the expensive side. No bargains for sure. Nice selection though. Missed a sale with us, mainly because of price but fit too to be fair.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Rodney Flagg
text: Stopped there to transfer over from chapel hill to proceed unto the rdu airport, always enjoy this area nice people great culture,basketball history here,starting with Micheal Jordan,and a few friends I come and see,great atmosphere and down home folks
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: mizzshorttiff
text: Went for a concert. It was my 1st time ever. No complaints.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Kenneth Parker
text: Well built and comfortable building.  Includes a Bojangles.  Restrooms top notch.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Starr Brown
text: Beautiful building with clean restrooms.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Noah
text: 2010s vibes, relatively modern, lots of event spaces, but can easily become crowded. Packed during lunch.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: F. “Effective Problem Solving” Rahal
text: Agree with many of the reviewers. Great place, clean, accommodations is world class.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Baker Ingram
text: It is a beautiful building where all the students/non can get school swag.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Olawumi Roseline Olasunkanmi
text:
I love taking a walk around here every Friday 😘

Lovely and amazing events every week!
Free swags, vest, and sometimes snack 😋

text: Went for UNC Graduation.  Great place
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

text: Worst student union in history.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

text: Well maintained and looks inviting.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Ethan Kick
text: Fun space to study, hangout, and meet up.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Y Guo
text: I miss the bagels! Especially The “New Yorker”s!!!
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Caroline
text: Great environment. Hayley made this experience great!

text: It has been updated nicely in the 20 years since I last visited.

text: Great place to chill or study

name: Deborah Brown
text: Nice study spot
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

text: Air conditioning is too strong and so it's too cold and fountain drink selection is too limited but it has very fast wifi and good coffee selection
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Em
text: Great place to study or chill with groups
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Elena Elms
text: Typical student union. Has an Alpine Bagels, with very slow, unfriendly service, and a Wendy's.

text: Lots of variety and comfortable

name: Edward M.
text: One of the best

name: Elk Richardson
text: Okay
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Sonia Payerpaj
text: Not a great place for studying unless it's for group projects but always busy with activity Nd good place for quick bites/quick studying
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Abinav Katuru
text: The renovations have been great but in all honesty the building is just too old at this point
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Gary Beck Dallaghan
text: Confusing building. Glad I made extra time to get to the merting

name: RM B
text: Great building with food

name: Red Chocltpsyct
text: Alpine is the best
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Aidan Gray
text: Nice new furniture, wish there was a better restaurant downstairs.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Heather Stone
text: Nice place to go in and study and relax. The bagel shop is very yummy and not bad on the price either. Very clean.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Avinash Gomes
text: Nice place to relax and eat lunch. Pretty awesome bagel place
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Daren Bitter
text: Comfortable, friendly environment
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Bonita Graham
text: Food
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Debbie Carter
text: Nice place to gather to associate with students.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: HL Lowy
text: Historic.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Jupiter Frerer
text: Good place to study
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Christian Alvarez
text: Great location to hang out. Also, check out the Alpine Bagel Cafe!
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Andy
text: Really small with too many empty meeting rooms
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Becca Oluwashina
text: Nice spot to hang out in to study or meet classmates/friends. Wendy's on first floor, a bagel shop upstairs. A very central spot on campus.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Paige Derouin
text: Inside the union lives Alpine Bagel, the bagel shop of dreams. Here the everything bagels are seasoned on both sides and giant bags of yesterday's bagels are readily available and affordable. Since graduating, I have missed study breaks at Alpine immensely.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Robert Hare
text: Good atmosphere, a bit loud at times. Good facilities.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Forest Schweitzer
text: With ample quiet study space, rentable rooms for organizations, Alpine Bagels/Wendy's and even a dance studio the Student Union has pretty much anything a student could need in their daily life.  It's the perfect place to stop and chill for a while if you are on campus and need to burn an hour or two.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Nicholas Toma
text: Definitely the best student union in North Carolina.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Jimmy Custer
text: It's nice, but it could be larger given the size of UNC and parts of it feel outdated, like the game room section.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Brooks Townsend
text: Awesome place to hang around campus. Nearly everybody comes through here during the day, and it's a good place to grab a quick lunch and some coffee into the late hours of the night. Best study place in my opinion
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: K K
text: A great big space and nice people there.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Thomas Beasley
text: Outdated compared to other local universities. There has been talk about building a new union, but there is no concrete plan intact.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Michael Duda
text: This is a really beautiful student union. 3 floors all immaculately clean with awesome studying areas. There are also private gender neutral bathrooms and lactation rooms. Alpine Bagel and a Wendy's are both located here.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Evan Lineberger
text: It's a good place to hang out, but not a great place to study, it's too loud for that.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union

name: Vignesh Balasubramaniam
text: Great place to hang out and (possibly) get some homework done. Has a few places to eat, such as Alpine Bagel and Wendy's.
title: Frank Porter Graham Student Union
